name: ai-context
summary: AI context configuration center, installer, onboarding skill, and task-flow skeleton.

doc.title: ai-context
doc.summary: Install ai-context, then run ai-context-init to configure local profile, projects, scenes, skills, and rules.
doc.whenToRead: Read after selecting the ai-context project or when installing/configuring this repository.

scenes.name: ai-context configuration
scenes.reason: Core setup scene for a fresh ai-context installation.

skills.name: ai-context
skills.description: Use when entering, installing, validating, or modifying ai-context, or when routing tasks through project/scene/rule/skill JSON indexes.
skills.whenToLoad: Load when installing, validating, or modifying ai-context.

skills.name: ai-context-init
skills.description: Use after installing ai-context when the user needs first-time onboarding, personal AI preferences, project inventory, scene creation, skill/rule mounting, or migration from scattered notes into ai-context JSON.
skills.whenToLoad: Load after install or when initializing profile, projects, scenes, skills, and rules from user-provided notes.

readPolicy.notes: Start with this JSON. Load source Markdown, rules, or skills only when the task requires detailed instructions.
